interfaces.name: getDateShortcuts
interfaces.description: Return commonly used date shortcuts for homepage and filters, including upcoming Saturday/Sunday, this weekend, and next month range.

upcoming_saturday.description: ISO date string 'YYYY-MM-DD' for upcoming Saturday.

upcoming_sunday.description: ISO date string 'YYYY-MM-DD' for upcoming Sunday.

this_weekend_start_date.description: ISO date string for the start of 'this weekend' (Saturday).

this_weekend_end_date.description: ISO date string for the end of 'this weekend' (Sunday).

next_month_start_date.description: ISO date string for the first day of next calendar month.

next_month_end_date.description: ISO date string for the last day of next calendar month.

interfaces.name: getHomeSections
interfaces.description: Get configured homepage sections for navigation and highlighting main content groups.

description.description: Short section description for homepage tiles.

interfaces.name: getHomepageActivityHighlights
interfaces.description: Get highlighted activities for the homepage such as featured or popular listings.

parameters.name: variant
parameters.description: Which highlight set to return, e.g., 'featured', 'popular'.

parameters.name: content_groups
parameters.description: Optional list of content groups to limit results, e.g., ['events', 'seasonal_holiday'].

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of highlighted activities to return.

next_start_datetime.description: ISO datetime of the next upcoming session, if available.

price_summary.description: Pre-formatted price label, e.g., 'Free', '$15 per ticket'.

distance_miles.description: Distance from the default user location, if known.

interfaces.name: getUserToolSummaries
interfaces.description: Get summary counts for user tools: favorites, day plan (today), watchlist, and cart.

interfaces.name: getActivityFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for activity browsing or map view sidebars.

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: Context where filters will be used, e.g., 'browse', 'map', 'favorites', 'watchlist'.

parameters.name: content_group
parameters.description: Optional content group such as 'events', 'classes_programs', 'workshops_camps', 'seasonal_holiday' to tailor filters.

interfaces.name: searchActivities
interfaces.description: Search and filter activities for browse pages using keyword, date(s), age, price, time, distance, categories, tags, accessibility, and sort order.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Free-text search term, e.g., 'outdoor', 'parade', 'lights'.

parameters.name: date_start
parameters.description: Inclusive start date 'YYYY-MM-DD'. If only this is provided, searches that single date.

parameters.name: date_end
parameters.description: Inclusive end date 'YYYY-MM-DD' for a date range.

parameters.name: content_groups
parameters.description: Filter by one or more Activity.content_group values, e.g., ['events', 'classes_programs', 'workshops_camps', 'seasonal_holiday'].

parameters.name: activity_categories
parameters.description: Filter by Activity.activity_category values, e.g., ['indoor'], ['parks_playgrounds'], ['shows_performances'].

parameters.name: min_age
parameters.description: Minimum desired child age in years.

parameters.name: max_age
parameters.description: Maximum desired child age in years.

parameters.name: price_type
parameters.description: Price type filter: 'any', 'free', 'paid', or 'donation'.

parameters.name: price_max
parameters.description: Maximum price (per unit) in the activity's currency for filters like 'under 20' or 'under 50'.

parameters.name: time_of_day_buckets
parameters.description: One or more buckets, e.g., ['morning'], ['afternoon'], ['evening'], ['daytime'], ['after_4pm']. Matches ActivitySession.time_of_day_bucket.

parameters.name: days_of_week
parameters.description: Days of week to include, e.g., ['saturday'], ['monday','tuesday','wednesday','thursday','friday'] for weekdays.

parameters.name: schedule_recurrence
parameters.description: Filter by Activity.schedule_recurrence, e.g., 'one_time', 'weekly', 'multi_day', 'seasonal', or 'any'.

parameters.name: distance_max_miles
parameters.description: Maximum distance in miles from the user's default location (for list views).

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Filter by Activity.tags, e.g., ['holiday'], ['free_parking'].

parameters.name: accessibility_features
parameters.description: Filter by Activity.accessibility_features, e.g., ['sensory_friendly','stroller_friendly'].

parameters.name: rating_min
parameters.description: Minimum average rating, e.g., 4.5.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort mode: 'relevance', 'start_time_earliest', 'price_low_to_high', 'rating_high_to_low', 'distance_nearest_first'.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination (1-based).

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results per page.

interfaces.name: getActivityDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a single activity, including location, sessions, tags, accessibility, and pricing summary.

rating_summary.description: Pre-formatted rating label such as '4.7 (32 reviews)'.

interfaces.name: getUserDefaultLocation
interfaces.description: Get the user's default location used for distance calculations and initial map centering.

interfaces.name: searchLocations
interfaces.description: Search locations and neighborhoods by name for the map search field or address-based filters.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: User-typed location or neighborhood name, e.g., 'Riverside Park'.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of matching locations to return.

interfaces.name: getMapActivities
interfaces.description: Get activities for display on the interactive map around a center point and radius.

parameters.name: center_latitude
parameters.description: Latitude to center the map on.

parameters.name: center_longitude
parameters.description: Longitude to center the map on.

parameters.name: radius_miles
parameters.description: Search radius in miles around the center point.

parameters.name: date_start
parameters.description: Optional filter start date 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

parameters.name: date_end
parameters.description: Optional filter end date 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

parameters.name: activity_categories
parameters.description: Map category filters, e.g., ['playground'], ['storytime'], ['parks_playgrounds'].

parameters.name: content_groups
parameters.description: Optional Activity.content_group filters.

parameters.name: time_of_day_buckets
parameters.description: Filter by one or more time-of-day buckets.

parameters.name: days_of_week
parameters.description: Optional days of week filter.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Filter by tags such as 'holiday'.

parameters.name: accessibility_features
parameters.description: Filter by accessibility features such as 'sensory_friendly'.

parameters.name: price_type
parameters.description: Price type filter: 'any', 'free', 'paid', 'donation'.

parameters.name: price_max
parameters.description: Maximum price per unit.

interfaces.name: getMembershipFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Memberships & Passes page.

interfaces.name: getMemberships
interfaces.description: List memberships and passes with filters and sorting for the Memberships & Passes page.

parameters.name: membership_type
parameters.description: Filter by Membership.membership_type: 'family', 'individual', or 'any'.

parameters.name: price_max
parameters.description: Maximum membership price for filters like 'under 150'.

parameters.name: is_active_only
parameters.description: If true, only return memberships where is_active is true.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort mode: 'price_low_to_high', 'price_high_to_low', 'included_free_events_desc', 'included_free_events_asc'.

interfaces.name: getMembershipDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information about a specific membership product for the Membership Detail page.

included_free_events_per_year_label.description: Label for the included free events row, e.g., 'Included free events per year'.

interfaces.name: getMembershipComparison
interfaces.description: Return memberships and metadata needed to render a comparison table for selected memberships.

parameters.name: membership_ids
parameters.description: List of membership ids the user selected for comparison.

interfaces.name: addMembershipToCart
interfaces.description: Add a selected membership to the user's cart. Creates the cart if it does not exist.

parameters.name: billing_period
parameters.description: Chosen billing period, e.g., 'annual' or 'monthly'. If omitted, membership.billing_period_default is used.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: Quantity of this membership to add.

interfaces.name: getCart
interfaces.description: Get the current cart contents for the Cart page.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemBillingPeriod
interfaces.description: Update the billing period for a membership in the cart.

parameters.name: billing_period
parameters.description: New billing period, e.g., 'annual' or 'monthly'.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a membership item from the cart.

interfaces.name: confirmCartSelection
interfaces.description: Confirm the user's memberships selection. Does not process payment, only finalizes selection for confirmation display.

confirmed_at.description: ISO datetime when the cart was confirmed.

interfaces.name: getRegistrationFormDefaults
interfaces.description: Get registration form defaults and session options for an activity before displaying the registration page.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: If provided, pre-select this session in the form.

interfaces.name: submitRegistration
interfaces.description: Submit a registration/booking for an activity session and return confirmation.

parameters.name: participants_count
parameters.description: Number of spots requested, e.g., 2 for two children.

interfaces.name: getFavoritesList
interfaces.description: Get all favorited activities with optional filters for the Favorites page.

parameters.name: date_start
parameters.description: Filter favorites with sessions on or after this date 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

parameters.name: date_end
parameters.description: Filter favorites with sessions on or before this date.

parameters.name: content_groups
parameters.description: Filter by Activity.content_group values.

parameters.name: activity_categories
parameters.description: Filter by Activity.activity_category.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Filter favorites by tags like 'holiday', 'free_parking'.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort mode: 'added_desc', 'added_asc', 'date_asc', 'date_desc'.

interfaces.name: addActivityToFavorites
interfaces.description: Add an activity to the default favorites list. Creates the list if it does not exist.

interfaces.name: removeFavorite
interfaces.description: Remove a favorite item from the favorites list.

interfaces.name: getDayPlan
interfaces.description: Get the day plan for a specific date, including activities organized by time of day and summary information.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date for the day plan 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

interfaces.name: addActivityToDayPlan
interfaces.description: Add an activity (and optional session) to the day plan for a specific date. Creates the day plan if it does not exist.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date to plan 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Specific session to use in the plan. If omitted and only one matching session exists, it may be inferred.

parameters.name: time_of_day_bucket
parameters.description: Optional explicit time-of-day bucket: 'morning', 'afternoon', 'evening', 'daytime', 'after_4pm'. If omitted, inferred from the session.

interfaces.name: updateDayPlanItemTime
interfaces.description: Update which time-of-day bucket a day plan item belongs to (e.g., move it from afternoon to evening).

parameters.name: time_of_day_bucket
parameters.description: New time-of-day bucket: 'morning', 'afternoon', 'evening', 'daytime', 'after_4pm'.

interfaces.name: updateDayPlanItemSortOrder
interfaces.description: Update the sort order of a day plan item to support reordering within a time-of-day bucket.

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: New sort order number; lower values are shown earlier.

interfaces.name: removeDayPlanItem
interfaces.description: Remove an activity from the day plan.

interfaces.name: getWatchlist
interfaces.description: Get the user's watchlisted classes and programs with optional filters for the Watchlist page.

parameters.name: schedule_recurrence
parameters.description: Filter by Activity.schedule_recurrence, e.g., 'weekly'.

parameters.name: distance_max_miles
parameters.description: Filter watchlisted items by distance from default location.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort mode: 'distance_nearest_first', 'title', 'added_desc'.

interfaces.name: addActivityToWatchlist
interfaces.description: Add an activity to the user's watchlist for classes/ongoing programs.

interfaces.name: removeFromWatchlist
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the user's watchlist.

interfaces.name: getAboutContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page explaining the site's purpose and sourcing.

interfaces.name: getContactInfo
interfaces.description: Get contact details (email, phone, address) for the Contact page.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a message via the Contact form.

interfaces.name: getFAQContent
interfaces.description: Get Help & FAQ content including step-by-step guides for common tasks.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get the Privacy Policy content.

interfaces.name: getTermsContent
interfaces.description: Get the Terms & Conditions content.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the existing Cart or create a new one for the single user and persist it.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateFavoritesList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or create the default FavoritesList for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateWatchlist
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or create the default Watchlist for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateDayPlan
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or create a DayPlan entity for a given date.

helperFunctions.name: _getUserDefaultLocation
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to resolve the single user's default Location for distance calculations and map centering.

helperFunctions.name: _inferTimeOfDayBucketFromSession
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper that infers the appropriate time_of_day_bucket from an ActivitySession.start_datetime.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateEstimatedCostForActivity
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to estimate an activity's cost for day plan summaries based on Activity pricing fields and participants assumptions.
